_doc: THE LAW REGISTRY (June 12, born from the 2/5 zoom-out: a law existed on paper while its enforcement was a dead variable). Every law maps to its ENFORCEMENT POINT (file + symbol that must exist) and its TEST. status: enforced | paper_only | pending_ruling. law_registry_check.py verifies the symbols exist and runs the tests — paper_only laws are surfaced loudly, never silently.

laws.statement: No order-CTAs / offers on religious or emotional days (Ramadan, Eid, Founding Day, National Day, Mothers Day) — including when the slot type lies but the text implies the occasion.
laws.source: Mohamed's red lines (memory: feedback_saudi_content_red_lines) + cold consult 2026-06-12
laws.note: Gate enforces; 192 corpus flags await Mohamed's gold_cta_ruling card (law vs his gold corpus).

laws.statement: Allah's name (اللهم/الله/يا رب) and a brand name never share a caption — supplication is never a sales vehicle.
laws.source: data/cultural_gate.json hard_block + cold consult 2026-06-12 (was a dead variable)

laws.statement: No invented offers, products, prices, or service models (e.g. waiters at counter-service brands). Offer-words blocked unless truth_pack confirms an offer.
laws.source: Truth guards (June) + cold consult (حلا البيك / عرض البيك الليلة)
laws.note: offer-word gate live; product-noun entailment waits for keys (noted, not claimed)

laws.statement: Captions must be SHORT: 15 words max (Mohamed's number, portal tap 2026-06-12).
laws.note: his tap: w15. Gate live; renderer prompt envelope follows on key refill.

laws.statement: Worn phrases (لحظة 19.8% saturation, يجمعنا formula, له طعم ثاني skeleton) must not repeat across brands/minds — clients must not share one voice.
laws.note: cross-brand universals banned standing in every render; n-gram gate at v5 still due

laws.statement: Slot type must match content: occasion content never rides an evergreen slot (slot-laundering bypasses the no-sell law); teaser beats never depict day-of scenes; moonsighting_check must be respected.
laws.note: Text-implied occasion inherits the occasion's law regardless of slot.type (the bypass is closed at the gate; generation-side slot hygiene still due on key refill).

laws.statement: Nothing is ever deleted without Mohamed's literal «DELETE APPROVED». Quarantine, never delete (90 days).
laws.note: Tombstones archive; lint reports flag, never delete.

laws.statement: Streaks, bench, gold, crystallize fire ONLY from Mohamed's column. Team verdicts advisory; RABIE provisional; machines never judge taste (AI judge scored random = real).
No fabricated metrics: scorecards show counts, never composite scores; forbidden fields (quality_score/auto_score/ai_score/sentiment) refuse to write.
Judge identity resolves server-side from per-judge keys; unknown keys quarantine — NEVER default to mohamed.
An issue closes only with a commit that EXISTS and TOUCHES its target, verified by an allowlisted script exit-0; 'verified' is rendered 'per the script', never truth.
Every wire ships with one synthetic event pushed through the WHOLE pipe (component asserts lie; the gold wire shipped severed ×3 with green unit checks).
laws.source: Zoom-out chair 2026-06-12 (the 2/5) — CRYSTALLIZE CANDIDATE awaiting Mohamed
laws.note: Standing in make_sure; the LAW (every future wire) awaits Mohamed's crystallize tap.

laws.statement: Mohamed judges COMPLETE POSTS (occasion, idea, visual, reasoning, caption) — never fragments; blind verdicts quarantine.
laws.source: Rule #9 + Mohamed verbatim 2026-06-12: 'i need to see the photo the ocassion and the idea... not the captions'

laws.statement: Judging batches: 20 cards MAX per round (money + attention discipline).
laws.source: Mohamed (June 12): 'photos in batches of 20 MAX per judging round'
laws.note: seed_judge_cards defaults to 5; no hard cap coded. Low risk, add -n ceiling.

laws.statement: Prices/offers never appear in copy until the client confirms them (albaik cultural_overrides: prices_in_copy=off_until_truth_confirmed).
laws.note: Same build item as no_invented_facts offer-word check.
